examples: In order that training should be effective it must be planned systematically.
Selective schools don't systematically employ better instructional approaches than less selective schools.
The question is whether those kinds of experiences do so systematically across individuals and create exactly the same changes.
What now becomes possible is to create organizations with systems and processes that are systematically life-enhancing.
Also, whereas Rwanda has looted systematically to pay for its war, Uganda has done so haphazardly.
